title: Course
description: An academic Course at Waterloo, a Course can be scheduled to become a Class

courseId.description: Course Id that identifies this Course, not unique across terms

courseOfferNumber.description: Course Offer Number identifies cross-listed and similar Courses that shared a Course Id in a Term

termCode.description: Waterloo Term code for which this Course data applies

termName.description: Waterloo Term name for which this Course data applies

associatedAcademicCareer.description: Academic Career code associated with Course

associatedAcademicGroupCode.description: The Academic Group code that is assocaited to this Course

associatedAcademicOrgCode.description: The Academic Organization code that is associated to this Course

subjectCode.description: The Subject code for this Course

catalogNumber.description: The Catalog Number for this Course

title.description: Course title, full name of course

descriptionAbbreviated.description: Short description of the course, often an abbreviation of the title

description.description: Description of the Course content and topics

gradingBasis.description: Code to describe the grading basis for this course, can be overriden at Class level

courseComponentCode.description: Course Component Code that describes if the course is a lecture, tutorial, etc.

enrollConsentCode.description: Code describing whether No, Instructor, or Department consent to enroll is required. Can be overwridden at Class level.

enrollConsentDescription.description: Description of the enroll requirement. Can be overwridden at Class level.

dropConsentCode.description: Code describing whether No, Instructor, or Department consent to drop is required. Can be overwridden at Class level.

dropConsentDescription.description: Description of the drop requirement. Can be overwridden at Class level.

requirementsDescription.description: Description of the Course requirements, such as pre-requisites, anti-requisites, and co-requisites
